response: The New South Wales Rugby League (NSWRL) was formed in Sydney on 8 August 1907. H Kaufman was a rugby league player in the NSWRL, and the NSWRL was the governing body of rugby league in New South Wales and the Australian Capital Territory. Therefore, the NSWRL was formed in 1907, and H Kaufman was a rugby league player in the NSWRL during that time.
